channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

👤 Owner: Kianmhz

📝 Repository: Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN

📝 Repository: alash3al/stash

item.title: 🐹 jeremiah-masters/dlht (246 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jeremiah-masters

📝 Repository: jeremiah-masters/dlht

📄 Descrizione: High-performance, lock-free concurrent hash table in Go, based on DLHT, with cooperative resizing and cache-efficient buckets.

⭐ Stelle: 246

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Go

item.title: 🐹 Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient (168 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Hidden-Node

📝 Repository: Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient

📄 Descrizione: GooseRelayVPN Android client: a SOCKS5 VPN with profile-based setup, live logs, and JSON import/export that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES-256-GCM, domain-fronted).

⭐ Stelle: 168

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm http-proxy mitm proxy sni socks5 tunnel tunneling vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T22:33:54Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-11T05:22:28Z
